title: Meeting notes for Google Meet that never leave your machine — AI Assist
excerpt: AI meeting notes for Meet + Zoom Web today, Microsoft Teams coming soon. Proactive insights + ask questions grounded in your own files. Bring your own Anthropic + OpenAI keys. $3 one-time.
content_html:
AI Assist

Features Compare Pricing FAQ Blog Open app →

Local-first · BYOK · macOS + Linux · Windows & ChromeOS soon

Live captions, proactive insights citing your own files, and ask-any-question grounded in the folders you've permissioned. Your keys, your machine. $3 one-time.

Both pieces are required · 14-day free trial · No bot joins your call
~$225/yr cheaper than Otter Business — you pay Anthropic + OpenAI direct, no per-seat markup.
On Windows or ChromeOS? Get notified when it ships →

Live in your meeting tab. Captions stream into the panel; answers are grounded in the files you've shared with the local helper — with citations.

Built for people who actually take notes

Bring your own keys

You pay Anthropic for the LLM and OpenAI for Whisper directly. We never see the keys, never mark up usage, never throttle you.

No third-party bot

The extension runs in your browser. Captures the tab you're already in. No Otter, no Fireflies, no awkward "AI Assist has joined the meeting" notification.

On-device transcription

Captions from your meeting tab go to a local helper. Whisper transcription runs through your own OpenAI key. Raw audio never touches our servers.

Proactive insights during the call

As the meeting unfolds, AI Assist auto-surfaces "findings" — the relevant excerpts from your own notes, docs, and past transcripts, cited by filename. You don't have to ask. It's like having a colleague quietly pulling up the right document the moment it's mentioned.

Ask anything, grounded in your files

Type or highlight a question — "what did we decide about the export pipeline?", "what's the 2025 interest expense for Precision?" — and the answer comes back with citations to the folders you've permissioned. On-device embeddings; the files never leave your machine.

Optional cloud sync, end-to-end encrypted

Want past meetings on other devices? Turn on cloud sync — $3/mo. Transcripts are encrypted on your device with a key derived from your master key. We see ciphertext only.

Meet + Zoom Web today · Teams coming soon

Google Meet and Zoom Web work out of the box today; Microsoft Teams Web coming soon. The extension stays narrow on purpose — single content-script per meeting host, easy for reviewers to audit.

How AI Assist compares

AI Assist Otter Fireflies Granola Tactiq
Bring your own API keys ✓ — — — —
No bot joins your call ✓ — — ✓ ✓
Audio never leaves your device ✓ — — partial* —
Proactive insights citing your files ✓ — — — —
Ask questions grounded in your local files ✓ — — — —
One-time price option ✓ $3 — — — —
Cloud sync end-to-end encrypted ✓ — — — —

* Granola captures locally but sends audio to their servers for processing. Based on public product docs as of July 2026.

Pricing

Desktop license

$3

one-time payment

  • Perpetual access
  • 14-day free trial first
  • All transcription & summary features
  • On-device file indexing
  • Free updates within v0.x

Buy desktop license

Cloud sync add-on

$3

per month

  • Sync transcripts across devices
  • End-to-end encrypted
  • Optional — desktop works without it
  • Cancel anytime

Add cloud sync

I built AI Assist after getting sick of Otter's bot joining every call I was on — and paying per seat for the privilege. This one runs on your machine, uses keys you already have, and costs $3 once. If that's the meeting notes tool you've wanted to exist, it now does.

— Ricardo Figueroa, solo dev · support@getaiassist.app

What you'll need

AI Assist runs against your own LLM + transcription accounts so we never see your data or your spend. ~5 minutes from download to first meeting.

1

An Anthropic API key

For the LLM that powers summaries + grounded answers. Get one at console.anthropic.com. Pay-per-use, ~$0.50–$2 per typical meeting depending on length.

2

An OpenAI API key

For Whisper transcription. Get one at platform.openai.com. About $0.006/min of audio (~$0.36/hr).

3

A free AI Assist account

For pairing the browser to your desktop helper and (optionally) cloud sync across devices. Sign up takes 30 seconds.

Common questions

Is my meeting audio ever uploaded to your servers?

No. The desktop helper runs on your machine and streams audio directly to your OpenAI account via your own Whisper API key. AI Assist's backend never sees the audio.

Do I need to install two things?

Yes — the Chrome extension captures the meeting tab, and the desktop helper runs Whisper + Anthropic through your keys locally. Both downloads are free; the $3 is a one-time license for the helper. Setup is ~5 minutes.

What does "BYOK" mean and why does it matter?

Bring Your Own Keys. You pay Anthropic (LLM) and OpenAI (Whisper) directly, so you own the spend and we never see your API usage. Your typical cost is ~$0.50–$2 per meeting for the LLM plus ~$0.36/hr for Whisper — versus Otter Business at $19.99/user/mo whether you use it or not.

Can I ask questions about my own files during a meeting?

Yes — this is one of the main things AI Assist does. Point the desktop helper at folders you want indexed (a due-diligence pack, your engineering docs, meeting notes, contracts) and it builds a local vector index using on-device embeddings. During any call, type or highlight a question and the answer comes back with citations to specific files. The files themselves never leave your machine. See the architecture page for the data-flow diagram.

What are "proactive insights"? Do I have to click anything?

As the meeting unfolds, AI Assist watches the transcript and — when it detects a topic that overlaps with your indexed files — automatically surfaces a "finding" in the overlay: a short excerpt from the relevant file, cited by filename. You don't have to ask. Turn it off with the Auto toggle in the overlay header if you'd rather stay quiet and just ask questions manually.

How is this different from Otter or Fireflies?

No bot joins your call. Your audio never leaves your machine. You pay Anthropic + OpenAI direct with no per-seat markup. And the desktop client is $3 one-time, not a monthly subscription. See the comparison table above.

Does it work in Zoom or Teams?

Yes to both. Google Meet and Zoom Web are supported today; Microsoft Teams Web coming soon. The extension deliberately stays narrow — one content script per meeting host — so reviewers can audit it easily.

Is there a free trial?

Yes — 14 days, all desktop-license features included. Cloud sync is a separate $3/mo add-on and is optional; the desktop app works completely offline for local transcripts.

What about Windows or mobile?

macOS and Linux ship today. Windows and ChromeOS are actively being worked on — join the waitlist. There's no mobile plan; the whole point is that transcription runs on your own machine.

What if my company's IT team blocks AI notetakers?

Your call. AI Assist is designed exactly for the "no third-party bot, no audio upload, no per-seat SaaS contract" checklist that's been driving those blocks. Read the full architecture at /security, or email support@getaiassist.app to talk through it with your team.

We can't read your data, by design

The desktop helper runs on your machine and holds your keys. The browser extension talks to it over localhost. If you turn on cloud sync, transcripts are encrypted on your device with a key derived from your master key — the cloud stores ciphertext only. Read the full privacy policy →

sentences.en: Get one at platform.openai.com.
sentences.zh: 从 platform.openai.com 获取一个。

sentences.en: About $0.006/min of audio (~$0.36/hr).
sentences.zh: 音频每分钟约 0.006 美元（约 0.36 美元/小时）。

sentences.en: A free AI Assist account
sentences.zh: 免费的 AI Assist 帐户

blocks.html_en: For pairing the browser to your desktop helper and (optionally) cloud sync across devices. Sign up takes 30 seconds.

sentences.en: For pairing the browser to your desktop helper and (optionally) cloud sync across devices.
sentences.zh: 用于将浏览器与桌面助手配对以及（可选）跨设备云同步。

sentences.en: Sign up takes 30 seconds.
sentences.zh: 注册需要 30 秒。

sentences.en: Common questions
sentences.zh: 常见问题

blocks.html_en: No. The desktop helper runs on your machine and streams audio directly to your OpenAI account via your own Whisper API key. AI Assist's backend never sees the audio.

sentences.en: No. The desktop helper runs on your machine and streams audio directly to your OpenAI account via your own Whisper API key.
sentences.zh: 不需要。桌面助手在您的计算机上运行，​​并通过您自己的 Whisper API 密钥将音频直接传输到您的 OpenAI 帐户。

sentences.en: AI Assist's backend never sees the audio.
sentences.zh: AI Assist 的后端永远看不到音频。

blocks.html_en: Yes — the Chrome extension captures the meeting tab, and the desktop helper runs Whisper + Anthropic through your keys locally. Both downloads are free; the $3 is a one-time license for the helper. Setup is ~5 minutes.

sentences.en: Yes — the Chrome extension captures the meeting tab, and the desktop helper runs Whisper + Anthropic through your keys locally.
sentences.zh: 是的 - Chrome 扩展程序捕获会议选项卡，桌面助手通过您的本地按键运行 Whisper + Anthropic。

sentences.en: Both downloads are free; the $3 is a one-time license for the helper.
sentences.zh: 两种下载都是免费的； 3 美元是帮助者的一次性许可证。

sentences.en: Setup is ~5 minutes.
sentences.zh: 设置时间约为 5 分钟。

blocks.html_en: Bring Your Own Keys. You pay Anthropic (LLM) and OpenAI (Whisper) directly, so you own the spend and we never see your API usage. Your typical cost is ~$0.50–$2 per meeting for the LLM plus ~$0.36/hr for Whisper — versus Otter Business at $19.99/user/mo whether you use it or not.

sentences.en: Bring Your Own Keys.
sentences.zh: 带上你自己的钥匙。

sentences.en: You pay Anthropic (LLM) and OpenAI (Whisper) directly, so you own the spend and we never see your API usage.
sentences.zh: 您直接向 Anthropic (LLM) 和 OpenAI (Whisper) 付费，因此您拥有支出，我们永远不会看到您的 API 使用情况。

sentences.en: Your typical cost is ~$0.50–$2 per meeting for the LLM plus ~$0.36/hr for Whisper — versus Otter Business at $19.99/user/mo whether you use it or not.
sentences.zh: LLM 每次会议的典型费用约为 0.50 美元至 2 美元，Whisper 费用约为 0.36 美元/小时，而 Otter Business 的费用为 19.99 美元/用户/月，无论您是否使用它。

blocks.html_en: Yes — this is one of the main things AI Assist does. Point the desktop helper at folders you want indexed (a due-diligence pack, your engineering docs, meeting notes, contracts) and it builds a local vector index using on-device embeddings. During any call, type or highlight a question and the answer comes back with citations to specific files. The files themselves never leave your machine. See the architecture page for the data-flow diagram.

sentences.en: Yes — this is one of the main things AI Assist does.
sentences.zh: 是的——这是 AI Assist 所做的主要事情之一。

sentences.en: Point the desktop helper at folders you want indexed (a due-diligence pack, your engineering docs, meeting notes, contracts) and it builds a local vector index using on-device embeddings.
sentences.zh: 将桌面助手指向您想要索引的文件夹（尽职调查包、工程文档、会议记录、合同），它会使用设备上的嵌入构建本地矢量索引。

sentences.en: During any call, type or highlight a question and the answer comes back with citations to specific files.
sentences.zh: 在任何通话期间，键入或突出显示问题，答案就会返回并引用特定文件。

sentences.en: The files themselves never leave your machine.
sentences.zh: 文件本身永远不会离开您的机器。

sentences.en: See the architecture page for the data-flow diagram.
sentences.zh: 请参阅架构页面的数据流图。

blocks.html_en: As the meeting unfolds, AI Assist watches the transcript and — when it detects a topic that overlaps with your indexed files — automatically surfaces a "finding" in the overlay: a short excerpt from the relevant file, cited by filename. You don't have to ask. Turn it off with the Auto toggle in the overlay header if you'd rather stay quiet and just ask questions manually.

sentences.en: As the meeting unfolds, AI Assist watches the transcript and — when it detects a topic that overlaps with your indexed files — automatically surfaces a "finding" in the overlay: a short excerpt from the relevant file, cited by filename.
sentences.zh: 随着会议的展开，AI Assist 会观看记录，当它检测到与索引文件重叠的主题时，会自动在叠加层中显示“发现”：相关文件的简短摘录，按文件名引用。

sentences.en: You don't have to ask.
sentences.zh: 你不必问。

sentences.en: Turn it off with the Auto toggle in the overlay header if you'd rather stay quiet and just ask questions manually.
sentences.zh: 如果您想保持安静并手动提问，请使用叠加标题中的“自动”切换将其关闭。

blocks.html_en: No bot joins your call. Your audio never leaves your machine. You pay Anthropic + OpenAI direct with no per-seat markup. And the desktop client is $3 one-time, not a monthly subscription. See the comparison table above.

sentences.en: No bot joins your call.
sentences.zh: 没有机器人加入您的通话。

sentences.en: Your audio never leaves your machine.
sentences.zh: 您的音频永远不会离开您的机器。

sentences.en: You pay Anthropic + OpenAI direct with no per-seat markup.
sentences.zh: 您直接向 Anthropic + OpenAI 付费，无需按席位加价。

sentences.en: And the desktop client is $3 one-time, not a monthly subscription.
sentences.zh: 桌面客户端一次性 3 美元，不是包月。

sentences.en: See the comparison table above.
sentences.zh: 参见上面的比较表。

blocks.html_en: Yes to both. Google Meet and Zoom Web are supported today; Microsoft Teams Web coming soon. The extension deliberately stays narrow — one content script per meeting host — so reviewers can audit it easily.

sentences.en: Yes to both.
sentences.zh: 两者皆是。

sentences.en: Google Meet and Zoom Web are supported today; Microsoft Teams Web coming soon.
sentences.zh: 现已支持 Google Meet 和 Zoom Web； Microsoft Teams Web 即将推出。

sentences.en: The extension deliberately stays narrow — one content script per meeting host — so reviewers can audit it easily.
sentences.zh: 该扩展故意保持狭窄——每个会议主持人一个内容脚本——以便审阅者可以轻松审核它。

blocks.html_en: Yes — 14 days, all desktop-license features included. Cloud sync is a separate $3/mo add-on and is optional; the desktop app works completely offline for local transcripts.

sentences.en: Yes — 14 days, all desktop-license features included.
sentences.zh: 是的 — 14 天，包括所有桌面许可证功能。

sentences.en: Cloud sync is a separate $3/mo add-on and is optional; the desktop app works completely offline for local transcripts.
sentences.zh: 云同步是一个单独的附加组件，每月 3 美元，并且是可选的；桌面应用程序完全离线工作以获取本地成绩单。

blocks.html_en: macOS and Linux ship today. Windows and ChromeOS are actively being worked on — join the waitlist. There's no mobile plan; the whole point is that transcription runs on your own machine.

sentences.en: macOS and Linux ship today.
sentences.zh: macOS 和 Linux 现已发布。

sentences.en: Windows and ChromeOS are actively being worked on — join the waitlist.
sentences.zh: Windows 和 ChromeOS 正在积极开发中 - 加入候补名单。

sentences.en: There's no mobile plan; the whole point is that transcription runs on your own machine.
sentences.zh: 没有移动套餐；重点是转录在您自己的机器上运行。

blocks.html_en: Your call. AI Assist is designed exactly for the "no third-party bot, no audio upload, no per-seat SaaS contract" checklist that's been driving those blocks. Read the full architecture at /security, or email support@getaiassist.app to talk through it with your team.

sentences.en: Your call.
sentences.zh: 你的电话。

sentences.en: AI Assist is designed exactly for the "no third-party bot, no audio upload, no per-seat SaaS contract" checklist that's been driving those blocks.
sentences.zh: AI Assist 正是针对“无第三方机器人、无音频上传、无单机 SaaS 合同”清单而设计的，正是这些清单推动了这些障碍。

sentences.en: Read the full architecture at /security, or email support@getaiassist.app to talk through it with your team.
sentences.zh: 请在 /security 阅读完整的架构，或发送电子邮件至 support@getaiassist.app 与您的团队讨论。

blocks.html_en: We can't read your data, by design

sentences.en: We can't read your data, by design
sentences.zh: 根据设计，我们无法读取您的数据

blocks.html_en: The desktop helper runs on your machine and holds your keys. The browser extension talks to it over localhost. If you turn on cloud sync, transcripts are encrypted on your device with a key derived from your master key — the cloud stores ciphertext only. Read the full privacy policy →

sentences.en: The desktop helper runs on your machine and holds your keys.
sentences.zh: 桌面助手在您的计算机上运行并保存您的密钥。

sentences.en: The browser extension talks to it over localhost.
sentences.zh: 浏览器扩展通过本地主机与其进行对话。

sentences.en: If you turn on cloud sync, transcripts are encrypted on your device with a key derived from your master key — the cloud stores ciphertext only.
sentences.zh: 如果您打开云同步，则记录会在您的设备上使用从您的主密钥派生的密钥进行加密 - 云仅存储密文。

sentences.en: Read the full privacy policy →
sentences.zh: 阅读完整的隐私政策 →

content_html_zh:
人工智能辅助

Features Compare Pricing FAQ Blog Open app →

本地优先 · BYOK · macOS + Linux · Windows 和 ChromeOS 即将推出

实时字幕、引用您自己的文件的主动见解以及基于您已许可的文件夹提出任何问题。 你的钥匙，你的机器。 3 美元一次。

这两部分都是必需的 · 14 天免费试用 · 没有机器人加入您的通话 ~ 比 Otter Business 便宜约 225 美元/年 — 您直接支付 Anthropic + OpenAI，没有每个席位的加价。 在 Windows 或 ChromeOS 上？ 发货时收到通知 →

住在您的会议选项卡中。 字幕流入面板；答案基于您与本地助手共享的文件 - 并附有引用。

专为真正记笔记的人打造

带上自己的钥匙

您可以直接向 Anthropic 支付 LLM 费用，向 OpenAI 支付 Whisper 费用。 我们永远不会看到按键，永远不会标记使用情况，永远不会限制您。

没有第三方机器人

该扩展程序在您的浏览器中运行。 捕获您已经所在的选项卡。 没有水獭，没有萤火虫，没有尴尬的“AI Assist 已加入会议”通知。

设备上转录

会议选项卡中的字幕将发送给本地助手。 Whisper 转录通过您自己的 OpenAI 密钥运行。 原始音频永远不会接触我们的服务器。

通话期间主动洞察

随着会议的展开，AI Assist 会自动显示“发现”——您自己的笔记、文档和过去的记录中的相关摘录，按文件名引用。 你不必问。 这就像一位同事在提到正确的文件时就悄悄地调出该文件一样。

询问任何事情，以你的文件为基础

输入或突出显示一个问题 - “我们对出口管道做出了什么决定？”、“Precision 2025 年的利息支出是多少？” — 答案会返回并引用您已许可的文件夹。 设备上嵌入；文件永远不会离开您的机器。

可选云同步，端到端加密

想要在其他设备上参加过去的会议吗？ 打开云同步 — 3 美元/月。 成绩单在您的设备上使用从您的主密钥派生的密钥进行加密。 我们只能看到密文。

今天 Meet + Zoom Web · 团队即将推出

如今，Google Meet 和 Zoom Web 开箱即用； Microsoft Teams Web 即将推出。 该扩展有意保持狭窄——每个会议主持人只有一个内容脚本，便于审阅者审核。

AI 辅助如何比较

人工智能辅助 Otter 萤火虫 格兰诺拉麦片 塔克提克
携带您自己的 API 密钥 ✓ — — — —
没有机器人加入您的通话 ✓ — — ✓ ✓
音频永远不会离开您的设备 ✓ — — 部分的* —
引用您的文件的主动见解 ✓ — — — —
提出基于本地文件的问题 ✓ — — — —
一次性价格选项 ✓ $3 — — — —
云同步端到端加密 ✓ — — — —

* Granola 在本地捕获，但将音频发送到其服务器进行处理。 基于截至 2026 年 7 月的公共产品文档。

桌面许可证

  • 永久访问权
  • 先免费试用 14 天
  • 所有转录和摘要功能
  • 设备上的文件索引
  • v0.x 内免费更新

购买桌面许可证

$3

每月

  • 跨设备同步成绩单
  • 端到端加密
  • 可选 — 桌面版无需它即可工作
  • 随时取消

添加云同步

在厌倦了 Otter 的机器人加入我正在通话的每一个通话并为每个席位付费以获得特权后，我创建了 AI Assist。 该程序在您的计算机上运行，​​使用您已有的密钥，一次费用为 3 美元。 如果这就是您想要的会议记录工具，那么现在它已经实现了。

— Ricardo Figueroa，独立开发者 · support@getaiassist.app

你需要什么

AI Assist 针对您自己的 LLM + 转录帐户运行，因此我们永远不会看到您的数据或支出。从下载到第一次会议约 5 分钟。

1

Anthropic API 密钥

对于提供总结+扎根答案的法学硕士。 在 console.anthropic.com 上获取一个。 按次付费，每次典型会议约 0.50 美元至 2 美元，具体取决于时长。

2

OpenAI API 密钥

用于耳语转录。 从 platform.openai.com 获取一个。 音频每分钟约 0.006 美元（约 0.36 美元/小时）。

3

免费的 AI Assist 帐户

用于将浏览器与桌面助手配对以及（可选）跨设备云同步。 注册需要 30 秒。

常见问题

Is my meeting audio ever uploaded to your servers?

不需要。桌面助手在您的计算机上运行，​​并通过您自己的 Whisper API 密钥将音频直接传输到您的 OpenAI 帐户。 AI Assist 的后端永远看不到音频。

Do I need to install two things?

是的 - Chrome 扩展程序捕获会议选项卡，桌面助手通过您的本地按键运行 Whisper + Anthropic。 两种下载都是免费的； 3 美元是帮助者的一次性许可证。 设置时间约为 5 分钟。

What does "BYOK" mean and why does it matter?

带上你自己的钥匙。 您直接向 Anthropic (LLM) 和 OpenAI (Whisper) 付费，因此您拥有支出，我们永远不会看到您的 API 使用情况。 LLM 每次会议的典型费用约为 0.50 美元至 2 美元，Whisper 费用约为 0.36 美元/小时，而 Otter Business 的费用为 19.99 美元/用户/月，无论您是否使用它。

Can I ask questions about my own files during a meeting?

是的——这是 AI Assist 所做的主要事情之一。 将桌面助手指向您想要索引的文件夹（尽职调查包、工程文档、会议记录、合同），它会使用设备上的嵌入构建本地矢量索引。 在任何通话期间，键入或突出显示问题，答案就会返回并引用特定文件。 文件本身永远不会离开您的机器。 请参阅架构页面的数据流图。

What are "proactive insights"? Do I have to click anything?

随着会议的展开，AI Assist 会观看记录，当它检测到与索引文件重叠的主题时，会自动在叠加层中显示“发现”：相关文件的简短摘录，按文件名引用。 你不必问。 如果您想保持安静并手动提问，请使用叠加标题中的“自动”切换将其关闭。

How is this different from Otter or Fireflies?

没有机器人加入您的通话。 您的音频永远不会离开您的机器。 您直接向 Anthropic + OpenAI 付费，无需按席位加价。 桌面客户端一次性 3 美元，不是包月。 参见上面的比较表。

Does it work in Zoom or Teams?

两者皆是。 现已支持 Google Meet 和 Zoom Web； Microsoft Teams Web 即将推出。 该扩展故意保持狭窄——每个会议主持人一个内容脚本——以便审阅者可以轻松审核它。

Is there a free trial?

是的 — 14 天，包括所有桌面许可证功能。 云同步是一个单独的附加组件，每月 3 美元，并且是可选的；桌面应用程序完全离线工作以获取本地成绩单。

What about Windows or mobile?

macOS 和 Linux 现已发布。 Windows 和 ChromeOS 正在积极开发中 - 加入候补名单。 没有移动套餐；重点是转录在您自己的机器上运行。

What if my company's IT team blocks AI notetakers?

你的电话。 AI Assist 正是针对“无第三方机器人、无音频上传、无单机 SaaS 合同”清单而设计的，正是这些清单推动了这些障碍。 请在 /security 阅读完整的架构，或发送电子邮件至 support@getaiassist.app 与您的团队讨论。

根据设计，我们无法读取您的数据

桌面助手在您的计算机上运行并保存您的密钥。 浏览器扩展通过本地主机与其进行对话。 如果您打开云同步，则记录会在您的设备上使用从您的主密钥派生的密钥进行加密 - 云仅存储密文。 阅读完整的隐私政策 →
